title: Improve extension test coverage from 87% to 95%+
context: Coverage audit revealed 88% func / 87% line coverage across pi extensions. Main gaps: render functions (context7, exa-search, wiki-lint, wiki-search), subagent orchestration (shared/src/subagent.ts at 67%), plan-mode (58%), explore/file-index.ts (53%), and 3 extensions with zero tests (todo 303 LOC, wiki-stash 195 LOC, git-checkpoint 57 LOC). All extensions use Bun test runner with shared mocks from @pi-ext/shared/test-mocks.
architecture: Bun test runner, mock.module() hoisting, co-located *.test.ts files, shared mock factories in shared/src/test-mocks.ts. Render tests use piTuiRenderMock from shared. Extensions register tools/commands and have render functions for TUI output.

red.description: Write tests in wiki-lint/render.test.ts for render.ts: test renderLintResult with empty results, with violations (error/warning/info levels), with fix suggestions. Use piTuiRenderMock and assert on rendered string output.

green.description: Implement or adjust render.ts only if tests reveal dead code — the goal is covering existing logic, not changing it. Tests drive the coverage up by exercising all branches.

refactor.description: Extract repeated render setup (theme, width) into a helper if duplication emerges.

red.description: Write tests for uncovered branches in wiki-search/render.ts: empty search results, results without highlights, results with long file paths that need truncation.

green.description: Cover the remaining edge cases by exercising the uncovered lines (44-48, 56, 59, 72).

red.description: Write tests in context7/render.test.ts for render.ts: test renderSearchResult with no results, with result items at different indentation levels, with error state, with loading state.

green.description: Exercise all render branches using piTuiRenderMock. Cover lines 44-48, 59-62, 64-69, 71-75, 114-118, 129-132, 134-145.

red.description: Write tests in exa-search/render.test.ts for render.ts: test renderSearchResults with empty results, single result, multiple results, results with/without highlights, error states.

Write tests for uncovered file-index.ts functions: FileIndex scoring edge cases (empty index, single file, duplicate scores), index building from directory tree, file watching add/remove/update paths.

green.description: Cover the large uncovered block (lines 136-249, 400-421, 550-597) by exercising index construction and query execution.

red.description: Write tests in shared/src/subagent.test.ts for uncovered orchestration paths: error handling during subagent execution, cancellation/timeout scenarios, session lifecycle, retry logic.
Write tests for plan-mode/index.ts: test registerCommand handler, plan display rendering, plan creation via command, edit flow.

green.description: Cover lines 57-63, 77-93, 98-102 by mocking command context and exercising the command handler.

steps.name: Step 8: todo extension — new test file (0 → integration)

red.description: Create todo/integration.test.ts with tests for the extension load/register cycle: verify the tool registers, verify execute returns expected result shapes for add/list/complete operations using mocked todo storage.

green.description: Implement the integration test using the same pattern as other extensions integration.test.ts files.

steps.name: Step 9: wiki-stash extension — new test file (0 → integration)

red.description: Create wiki-stash/integration.test.ts with tests for the extension load/register cycle: verify tool registration, test stash/save/list operations with temp directory fixtures.

green.description: Implement the integration test following the established pattern.

steps.name: Step 10: git-checkpoint extension — new test file (0 → integration)

red.description: Create git-checkpoint/integration.test.ts with tests for the extension load/register cycle: verify command registration, test checkpoint creation with mocked git operations.

green.description: Implement the integration test following the established pattern.

notes: Render tests should use piTuiRenderMock (not piTuiMock) for working render() methods
subagent.ts mocking requires careful AgentSession mock setup
Extensions with zero tests (todo, wiki-stash, git-checkpoint) need integration.test.ts only — excluded from CI via path-ignore-patterns
Target: 95%+ line coverage overall, no file below 80%
